mapper.select:
/* smsInfoAlienationMapper.selectInfoAnSendList */ SELECT C.CONTRACT_NUM ,C.SMS_IN_CTN ,C.MODEL_NAME ,C.FST_RATE_NM ,C.INST_INFO_A ,C.INST_INFO_B ,C.INST_INFO_C ,C.OPEN_AGNT_NM ,C.SCHEDULE_TIME FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , CASE WHEN FN_GET_AGE_JAVA(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(A.USER_SSN)) > 0 AND FN_GET_AGE_JAVA(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(A.USER_SSN)) < 19 THEN LGL_AGNT_NO ELSE SUBSCRIBER_NO END AS SMS_IN_CTN , A.MODEL_NAME , B.FST_RATE_NM , NVL(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(B.INST_INFO, 26, 3)),0) AS INST_INFO_A , NVL(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(B.INST_INFO, 13, 10)),0) AS INST_INFO_B , NVL(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(B.INST_INFO, 23, 3)),0) AS INST_INFO_C , FN_GET_ORGNM(A.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS OPEN_AGNT_NM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') || '093000','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + (TRUNC((ROWNUM - 1) / 10000) * (1/24)), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SCHEDULE_TIME FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A ,MSP_REQUEST_DTL B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'A' AND B.CSTMR_TYPE <> 'JP' AND SUBSTR(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,1,6) = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1),'YYYYMM')
AND ((FN_GET_AGE_JAVA(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(A.USER_SSN)) > 0 AND FN_GET_AGE_JAVA(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(A.USER_SSN)) < 19) OR (FN_GET_AGE_JAVA(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(A.USER_SSN)) >= 80) OR (B.CSTMR_TYPE = 'FN')) ) C WHERE 1=1 AND SMS_IN_CTN IS NOT NULL AND REGEXP_LIKE(SMS_IN_CTN, '^010-?[0-9]{4}-?[0-9]{4}$')
